name: threejs
description: Single-file Three.js scaffold: pinned vendored modules (r182), resize handling, requestAnimationFrame render loop, and a marked region where the model writes the scene.
promptInstructions: You are given the complete contents of index.html below. Return the COMPLETE file with the region between '=== YOUR SCENE HERE ===' and '=== END YOUR SCENE ===' replaced by your scene (the placeholder cube is an example — remove it). Do not modify the import map, the renderer setup, the resize handler, or the render loop. Do not load any external resources: only the vendored 'three' module is available (no three/addons, no CDN, no textures from URLs — generate textures procedurally if needed). Drive all animation from the timestamp t passed to update(t); do not create your own requestAnimationFrame loop or use setInterval.
